channel.title: exit code on Sebastian Hoß
channel.description: Recent content in exit code on Sebastian Hoß

item.title: Ignore Exit Codes
item.description: In case you are using a Makefile to define a complex build step - e.g. start database, run tests, stop database - consider using the - qualifier in front of your actual build step like this: .PHONY: build build: start-database -build-software stop-database Thanks to -, the database will be stopped even if building your software fails, thus making sure to clean up after ourselves once the build finishes. Links https://www.
